items.prompt: Self-checking order is best stated as…
choices: Wave only → human eyeball → maybe pass
Copy DUT output → expect → always pass
items.explain: Apply inputs, compute golden expect, compare DUT output, report.

items.prompt: Setting expect equal to the DUT output you just sampled is weak checking.
items.explain: Expect must come from a reference model or known truth table.

items.prompt: Starter and2: a=1, b=1, expect y=1, got y=1. Verdict?
choices: PASS — but only if waves look nice
items.explain: AND truth table: 1 AND 1 → 1; got matches expect.

items.prompt: In cocotb, assert after await on a settled cycle fits the self-check pattern.
items.explain: Stimulus, wait for time to advance, then compare — same loop.

items.prompt: Why compare after #1 or a clock edge instead of immediately after poke?
choices: Signals need time to settle — mid-transition samples lie
items.explain: Sample after delay or edge so compare uses stable values.
